text: Your task: call the MCP tool named `get-sum` with arguments {"a": 2, "b": 3} via the `call_tool` decision. The runtime will store the tool's result as an evidence record. After the tool result arrives, on the next tick emit an Output via the `emit_output` decision whose `content` includes the resulting sum and whose `evidence` array cites the evidence id of the get-sum call you just made. Then retire. Do not call any other tool; do not loop; do not idle except as a last resort.
